name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Stopped
notes: This Building Block defines virtual machine stop events.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Stopped on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Virtual Machine Stop Attempt, Audit.Virtual Machine Stop Success
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Stopped on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Virtual Machine Stop Attempt, Audit.Virtual Machine Stop Success
